sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23085" key="gura/leos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῡράλεος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n23085.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">γυρός</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rounded, curved,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:57" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.57</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
